status: TIER 1 PRIMARY-SOURCE BATCH A COMPLETE WITHIN DEFINED SCOPE / SUPPLIER PRODUCT PASSPORT OPEN / NOT PLATINUM CERTIFIED
classification: Recombinant human parathyroid hormone 1-34 peptide medicine
mechanism_summary: Intermittent parathyroid hormone receptor type 1 agonism stimulating bone formation and remodelling.
evidence_maturity: Extensive authorised osteoporosis, fracture-outcome and post-authorisation evidence; product and duration controls apply.
regulatory_headline: AUTHORISED OSTEOPOROSIS MEDICINE CONTEXTS EXIST / PRODUCT-SPECIFIC
certification_blockers: Catalogue 10 mg presentation versus authorised delivery systems
source_closure_scope: pivotal or major randomised human evidence
current major safety and contraindication sources
authoritative_product_boundary: Teriparatide is recombinant or synthetic human parathyroid hormone (1-34) used in multiple exact authorised products, including FORTEO and FORSTEO and authorised generic/biosimilar contexts. TER10 supplier powder is not an authorised prefilled pen, does not inherit its excipients or delivery system and has no demonstrated comparability.
human_evidence_boundary: The pivotal fracture-prevention trial randomised 1,637 postmenopausal women with osteoporosis to placebo or teriparatide and established product-specific vertebral and non-vertebral fracture evidence. That trial does not validate TER10 quality or use.
safety_source_boundary: Current controls include avoidance in patients at increased baseline osteosarcoma risk, hypercalcaemia, orthostatic hypotension, urolithiasis considerations and product-specific handling. Treatment duration and sequencing belong to licensed clinical care, not supplier powder.
